notes: STRENGTH's six-face arcana die. Rolled on Threshold Rolls during a Strength run. HOLD is the highest success — the weight taken without grip. DROP is the failure.

faces.description: Success ★★. The weight settles. Advance two toward the cage's address.
Success ★. You take it on. Spend 1 Time, advance one.
Partial. The hinge complains. Spend 2 Action cards to convert, or take the strain (+1 STRAIN).
Partial. The carousel turns a half-degree. Spend 2 Action cards to convert, or take the strain (+1 STRAIN).
Failure. You didn't set it; you let go without setting. +1 STRAIN.
Wild. ★ if STRAIN is below 6 — the lot still trusts you. Otherwise: failure, and the dog in the field looks up at you for a long second.
